creator: Shi, David Emory, author
description: "For the Record : A Documentary History of America, sixth edition, by David E. Shi and Holly A. Mayer is an American history reader. The reader's contents are made up of primary source documents which include dairies, journals, newspaper articles, speeches, government documents and novels"--Provided by publisher
Volume 1. From first contact through Reconstruction -- Volume 2. From Reconstruction through contemporary times
